BlogPost.title: BlogPost
BlogPost.description: Represents an article or post published in the blog

category.description: The category/area of the article (e.g. DIREITO CIVIL)

date.description: The formatted date when the article was published

title.description: The main headline or title of the blog post

excerpt.description: A short summary or teaser introduction of the post

content.description: The full body markdown-like text of the article

image.description: URL of the cover or featured image

readTime.description: Estimated reading duration (e.g. 5 min de leitura)

SystemUser.title: SystemUser
SystemUser.description: Represents an administrative user with portal access

name.description: The full name of the user

/blog_posts/{postId}.description: Collection of blog posts published by the firm's headless CMS

/system_users/{userId}.description: Collection of administrators and staff authorized to access the Admin Panel
